channel.title: Example Longform Podcast
channel.description: Long-form conversations on AI, health, culture, and ideas.

item.title: Episode 101 — The Future of Agentic Search
item.description: A deep dive into how AI agents are reshaping how we find and use information on the web.

item.title: Episode 100 — Longevity and the Quantified Self
item.description: Exploring the intersection of health data, wearables, and AI-assisted wellness coaching.

item.title: Episode 99 — Creator Economies in 2026
item.description: What does it mean to build a sustainable audience in the age of AI-generated content?
